issues.claim: Reproducible in code or org practice (not pure metaphor)
issues.objection: 4.31 concrete_scenario describes a configuration observable in real engineering practice — the implication is testable: 'Audit the last quarter: what did you draw from the loop, what did you offer into it. If th…'. The diagnostic uses observable artifacts (PRs, design docs, dashboards, postmortems) and observable behaviours (decision-timelines, recovery times after praise/criticism, substrate-knowledge depth). STRETCHED tagging honest where the metaphysics exceeds reproducibility; the engineering shadow remains reproducible.

notes: Reproducibility test for 4.31: a senior engineer reading this verse can apply the diagnostic to her own team and observe the artifact-level signal. PASS.
